title: impl: space_create, space_join
description:
What: Add space_create and space_join to space.rs. These supersede x2d.1.

Algorithm:
1. space_create(&self, session, input: &SpaceCreateInput<'_>) -> Result<SetResponse, ClientError>:
   create_obj = json!({name: input.name})
   if Some(d): create_obj[description] = d
   if Some(b): create_obj[iconBlobId] = b
   args = json!({accountId, create: {input.client_id: create_obj}})
   build_request('Space/set'), call, extract

2. space_join(&self, session, input: &SpaceJoinInput<'_>) -> Result<SpaceJoinResponse, ClientError>:
   Guard: if invite_code.is_none() && space_id.is_none() { return Err(InvalidArgument('space_join: exactly one of invite_code or space_id must be provided')) }
   if both Some: return Err(InvalidArgument('space_join: only one of invite_code or space_id may be provided'))
   let mut args = json!({accountId: account_id})
   if Some(ic): args[inviteCode] = ic
   if Some(sid): args[spaceId] = sid
   build_request('Space/join'), call, extract

Add SpaceCreateInput, SpaceJoinInput, SpaceJoinResponse to import in space.rs.
Run cargo fmt, clippy, test. Close bead. Also close x2d.1 as superseded.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; space_create and space_join in space.rs; clippy clean
